response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer, but their profile does not match this role's core requirements. Professional C++ experience is limited to roughly seven months at National Instruments (2014–2015) plus a thesis project, far short of the mandatory 5–10 years of hands-on Windows C++. Their career centers on D, Node.js/TypeScript, and web platforms. There is no SQL Server or Oracle experience listed, and no fixed-income or capital-markets domain background — RIDE Capital is fintech-adjacent but not investment banking or fixed income.
strengths: Long, consistent engineering career with strong craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Broad technical range across backend, web, mobile, and embedded systems
concerns: Only ~7 months of professional C++ experience, none recent and none confirmed on Windows
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MongoDB/MySQL
No fixed-income, derivatives, or capital-markets domain exposure
